name: Kairous Acquisition Corp. Ltd
summary: PART I General Kairous Acquisition Corp. Limited (the Company) was incorporated in the Cayman Islands on March 24, 2021. The Company was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses (the Business Combination). The Company is not limited to a particular industry or sector for purposes of consummating a Business Combination. Our efforts to identify a prospective ta...
